title: bouvardia borhidiana
intro: Bouvardia borhidiana, also known as Borhid's bouvardia or Borhid's butterfly bush, is a flowering plant in the Rubiaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Bouvardia borhidiana include its potential to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and alleviate gastrointestinal problems. In herbal preparations, Bouvardia borhidiana can be made into a tea or infusion, or used as a tincture to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
